title: Contract CTO India: When Fractional Leadership Makes Sense
deck: Not every startup needs a full-time CTO. Here is how to know which stage you're in.
key_findings: Cost is typically 30-40% of a full-time senior hire
Most engagements convert to advisory role after 12 months

sections.heading: The problem isn't leadership, it's timing
sections.body: Early-stage companies often hire a full-time CTO before the technical complexity justifies the cost.

sections.heading: Why fractional works at this stage
sections.body: A contract CTO brings pattern recognition from multiple companies without the fixed cost of full-time equity and salary.

pull_quote: You don't need a permanent CTO. You need permanent clarity.
key_takeaways: Match engagement type to actual technical complexity
Fractional works best before Series A
Define a clear handoff plan from day one
author: Kavita Rai
